title: Tayloe Stansbury Joins FICO's Board of Directors
text: BOZEMAN, Mont.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $FICO--Global analytics software firm FICO (NYSE: FICO) today announced that Tayloe Stansbury has joined its Board of Directors. Stansbury's appointment to the Board is effective August 22, 2023. “We are excited to welcome Tayloe to the Board as a trusted advisor to FICO. His accomplished leadership and expertise in business and technology will be invaluable in helping guide FICO's success as we continue to drive innovative analytics solutions for our clients and execu.

title: Fair Isaac Continues Growth But Valuation Is High
text: Fair Isaac Corporation recently reported strong financial results, beating revenue and EPS estimates. The company offers credit scoring and software solutions to organizations globally. Revenue growth is accelerating, but the stock's valuation is high and loan originations may slow due to higher-for-longer interest rates.

title: PULSE® Extends Debit Fraud Detection Agreement with FICO®
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PULSE, a Discover® Financial Services (NYSE: DFS) company and operator of the PULSE debit network, has agreed to an extension of its partnership with global analytics software provider FICO (NYSE: FICO). PULSE and FICO collaborate to deliver market-leading fraud-detection technology that reduces losses and risk exposure for financial institutions, merchants and consumers worldwide. This extension supports PULSE in continuing to enhance its DebitProtect® suite of advanc.

title: Fair Isaac: Good Growth, but Expensive Stock
text: One of the most important personal financial planning tools for consumers is keeping a high credit score. A decent credit score has the potential to save borrowers thousands of dollars in interest expense as lenders recognize the value of a good credit history and typically offer lower interest rates.

title: This AI Stock Is Up Over 400% Since May -- Is It Too Late to Buy?
text: Upstart deploys AI to assess the creditworthiness of a potential borrower. The Federal Reserve is partially to blame for Upstart's previous stock woes.

title: Fair Isaac (FICO) Q3 Earnings Beat, Revenues Improve Y/Y
text: Fair Isaac's (FICO) third-quarter fiscal 2023 results benefit from higher revenues from mortgage, auto and credit card, personal loan and other originations.

title: Fair Isaac Corporation (FICO) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call August 2, 2023 5:00 PM ET Company Participants William Lansing - President, CEO & Director Steven Weber - CFO Conference Call Participants Manav Patnaik - Barclays Bank Faiza Alwy - Deutsche Bank Surinder Thind - Jefferies Rajiv Bhatia - Morningstar Inc. title: Fair Isaac (FICO) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Fair Isaac (FICO) came out with quarterly earnings of $5.66 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $5.30 per share. This compares to earnings of $4.47 per share a year ago.

title: FICO Announces Earnings of $5.08 per Share for Third Quarter Fiscal 2023
text: BOZEMAN, Mont.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--FICO (NYSE:FICO), a leading predictive analytics and decision management software company, today announced results for its third fiscal quarter ended June 30, 2023. Third Quarter Fiscal 2023 GAAP Results Net income for the quarter totaled $128.8 million, or $5.08 per share, versus $93.5 million, or $3.61 per share, in the prior year period. The current quarter earnings include a noncash reduction to income tax expense of $9.5 million, or $0.37 per share, associa.

title: Why Earnings Season Could Be Great for Fair Isaac (FICO)
text: Fair Isaac (FICO) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.
